tasks.subject: Comprehensive Workspace Sync & Update Protocol
tasks.description: 1) Intelligently merge feature branches into main, update submodules, merge upstream changes (and vice versa) across all repos. 2) Reanalyze project/history for missing features. 3) Update roadmap/docs. 4) Update submodule dashboard. 5) Update changelog/version. 6) Commit and push everything. 7) Redeploy.

tasks.subject: Global Workspace Sync & Maintenance Protocol
tasks.description:
1. Selective merge of feature branches into main across all repos and submodules.
2. Update submodules recursively and merge upstream changes (incorporating fork updates).
3. Conflict resolution without losing features/progress.
4. Sync feature branches with main (merge main into features).
5. Document all changes in HANDOFF.md and SUBMODULE_DASHBOARD.md.
6. Build all artifacts and push all changes.

tasks.subject: Fix Persistent Workspace Errors
tasks.description:
1. Fix .gitmodules syntax error in bobmani/beatoraja.
2. Resolve 'Filename too long' by breaking infinite recursion in tests/.
3. Fix Prettier formatting errors in Maestro.
4. Clean up stale git index.lock files.
5. Finalize submodule states for ksm-v2.

tasks.subject: Recursive Workspace Sync & Protocol Execution
tasks.description:
1. Recursive merge of local feature branches into main across all repos and submodules.
2. Recursive sync of main into feature branches to keep them updated.
3. Recursive sync with upstream parents for all forks.
4. Recursive submodule updates (init, update, recursive).
5. Comprehensive documentation (HANDOFF.md, SUBMODULE_DASHBOARD.md, Roadmap updates).
6. Build all and final push of all components.

tasks.subject: Fix Recursive Sync & Submodule Errors
tasks.description:
1. Fix 'bad revision HEAD' errors in submodules by checking out default branches.
2. Resolve 'embedded git repository' warnings by converting them to proper submodules or ignoring build-generated .git dirs.
3. Fix 'No such file or directory' errors for missing submodule paths.
4. Finalize the recursive sync protocol across all detected git repositories.
5. Generate a comprehensive handoff file.
tasks.activeForm: Fixing recursive sync errors and broken submodules

tasks.subject: Global Workspace Sync & Maintenance Protocol (Task #2)
tasks.description:
1. Synchronize all repositories and submodules: Fetch, pull, merge upstream changes, and merge local feature branches (especially AI-generated ones) into main/master.
2. Catch up feature branches: Merge main/master back into feature branches to keep them current.
3. Recursive Submodule Update: Update all submodules to their latest remote tracking branches and commit/push the updated pointers.
4. Conflict Resolution: Intelligently solve all merge conflicts to ensure no features or progress are lost.
5. Project Analysis: Reanalyze the workspace to identify missing features and update the roadmap/documentation.
6. Documentation: Generate/update a submodule dashboard and project structure guide.
7. Versioning: Update changelog and increment version numbers.
8. Final Sync: Commit and push all changes, then execute a global build.
tasks.activeForm: Executing Global Workspace Sync & Maintenance Protocol
